_meta.note: Phase 1: schedules block added. index.html reads schedules.mlb for full schedule. game_overlays remain for backward compat.

game_overlays.matchupNote: With both sides hovering on the Eastern Conference playoff bubble, tonight’s 401 Derby is a desperate six-pointer where the loser risks falling into a terminal tailspin. Pride is on the line, but the race for the final postseason berths makes this clash a must-win survival test for both Canadian rivals.

The Whitecaps head to Soldier Field desperate to solidify their postseason standing, while the Fire face a must-win scenario to keep their fading playoff hopes on life support. With the top-nine cutoff looming, every point is a lifeline in this high-stakes cross-conference clash.

game_overlays._match_key: St. Louis CITY SC|Sporting Kansas City
game_overlays.matchupNote: Sporting Kansas City travels to St. Louis tonight desperate to salvage their fading playoff hopes against a CITY side looking to solidify their own position in the crowded Western Conference hunt. With the postseason cutoff looming, this rivalry clash serves as a high-stakes desperation match where only three points will suffice for the visitors.

The Cascadia Cup rivalry reaches a fever pitch tonight as the Timbers and Sounders clash with both clubs desperate to solidify their standing in a crowded Western Conference playoff race. With every point critical in the push for the top nine, expect a hostile, high-stakes atmosphere where bragging rights are secondary to postseason survival.
